This place is a hidden gem in the city, offering a delightful dining experience with a nice ambiance, good vibes, and delicious food and beverages. The cozy and stylish interior and exterior, combined with comfortable seating, creates a warm and inviting atmosphere. The friendly and attentive staff add to the pleasant dining or just chilling experience. The menu offers a diverse range of dishes, from local delicacies to international favorites, each dish is crafted with precision and made with high-quality ingredients. The beverage selection is impressive, featuring expertly crafted coffees, refreshing mocktails, and artisanal teas. The overall dining experience at Jempolan is exceptional, perfect for brunch, lunch, or dinner. Despite the quality, prices are reasonable, providing excellent value for money. Jempolan Cafe and Eatery is a must-visit destination, where good vibes, delicious food, and a welcoming atmosphere combine for a memorable dining experience
Order type
Dine in
Meal type
Dinner

Rp 75–100K
Food: 5
Service: 5
Atmosphere: 5

Salad is one of the vegetarian options
